summary: Frontend-only testing of Sidharth's static CAD/CAM portfolio site. All major features tested: page load, hero, sections, project modals, certifications, admin panel login and functionality, mobile layout, and close behaviors.

ui_bugs.issue: Stats show different values across sessions (4+/1+/3+ vs 10+/2+/6+) depending on localStorage state. If localStorage is empty, portfolio.json is used which has fewer items.
7 section labels found and rendered correctly. Animated gradient line present.

issues: Hero avatar circle renders above text on mobile - layout looks intentional and functional
Stats are cut off below the fold on mobile - user must scroll to see them

action_items: Stats counter test expectation: portfolio.json has 7 certs, 4 projects, 1 year exp by default. The review request says '10+ certs, 5+ projects' which only appear if localStorage has been populated by admin. If fresh load, the hero stats show different numbers. Consider updating portfolio.json baseline data to match stated counts if these numbers are important.
critical_code_review_comments: closeModal() guard: `if (e && e.target !== ... && !e.target.classList...)` - when called directly via JS (not event), e is undefined and guard passes correctly. Works correctly.
Stats counters animate based on DATA loaded - if localStorage is empty, portfolio.json defaults are used. These show fewer stats than the admin-populated version.
Cert image click: only clickable if cert has an image property set. Default certs in portfolio.json have no images, so none are clickable in default state.
Admin password is base64 encoded in admin.js (YWRtaW4xMjM= = admin123) - this is security by obscurity only, not actual security.
test_credentials: Admin password: admin123 (base64 stored in admin.js)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static HTML site at http://localhost:3000/. Admin panel at /admin.html, password: admin123. Modal ID is #modal-overlay (not #project-modal). Admin panel uses #lock-pwd input and .lock-btn button. Modal uses active CSS class for show/hide (not display). All core flows work. Certs have no images in default data so cert click test needs admin-added certs.
passed_tests: Portfolio loads with hero, projects, certifications, contact sections
Project modal opens on card click (modal-overlay becomes active)
Modal shows 'No media attached yet.' for projects without media
Admin panel login works with password admin123 (.lock-pwd + .lock-btn)
Admin panel shows dashboard with 6 projects, 10 certifications
Admin panel: Download JSON button present
Admin panel: Project edit form works with + Add Photo and file input
Admin panel: SolidWorks guidance shown in 3D model section
Section labels with gradient lines visible (7 labels)
Mobile layout (390px) works - modal opens on mobile
Navbar responsive with hamburger menu on mobile
failed_tests: Overlay click to close modal - could not properly test due to overlay geometry (modal-overlay covers full viewport)
